name: Calendar
description: Month grid + upcoming events from one or more ICS feeds (Google Calendar, iCloud, Outlook, any standard .ics URL). Events are colour-coded to their source calendar via the left edge of each card. Layout switches automatically: events on the right in landscape cells, below the grid in portrait cells.

settings.name: calendars
settings.label: Calendars (one per line: NAME | URL | #HEX or NAME | URL)

settings.name: feed_url
settings.label: Single ICS feed URL (legacy — use Calendars above for multiple)
